name: config-sync materializes a per-rule options object with real options data for a third-party tool
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config-sync.sh" --rule-id g-ts-no-any --enforced-by "eslint,no-any.sh" --json 2>/dev/null | node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>s+=c);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{const j=JSON.parse(s);const o=j["g-ts-no-any"].options.eslint;process.exit(o&&Object.keys(o).length>0?0:1)})' && echo materializes-data 1>&2
